name: Westerwolde (Netherlands)
description: Quartered blue and yellow, the upper-hoist blue quarter charged with a yellow bound sheaf-like plant emblem with leafy branches.
history: Flag of the municipality of Westerwolde in the south-east of the province of Groningen, formed in 2018 from Bellingwedde and Vlagtwedde.

features.role: a yellow bound sheaf-like plant emblem with leafy branches
